hooks.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"RAPPELS TECHNIQUES :
- Prisma 5.22 (PAS v7). NextAuth v4 (PAS v5). Zod v4 (.issues). Next.js 16 (await params, revalidateTag 2 args).
- PublicSidebar.tsx = header public. ProductStatus : OFFLINE|ONLINE|ARCHIVED|SYNCING.
- Color.patternImage prioritaire sur hex. groupKey obligatoire (pas colorId seul).
- UI : useConfirm()/useToast() (context), CustomSelect (pas select natif), badge badge-*.
- Server actions : requireAdmin()/requireAuth(). getCached* + revalidateTag(tag, default).
- pdfkit/sharp/exceljs dans serverExternalPackages. ssr:false interdit dans Server Components."}}'
